organization.name: Lupine Science
organization.description: Lupine Science builds scientific tools for molecular and materials visualization.

home.title: Lupi shows molecules.
home.description: Visualize million-atom molecular scenes, organic chemistry functional groups, OMol25 geometries, and materials science structures in the browser.
home.imageAlt: Lupi molecular viewer title card from Lupine Science.

@graph.name: Lupi

@graph.name: Lupi molecular structure gallery
@graph.description: A curated gallery of molecules, materials structures, trajectories, and OMol25-linked examples for browser visualization.

massiveLattice.title: 1M Copper Lattice Scene - Lupi Molecular Viewer
massiveLattice.description: Open a 953,312-atom FCC copper lattice in Lupi and inspect a browser-controlled materials science scale-test scene.
massiveLattice.imageAlt: A nearly million-atom FCC copper lattice rendered in the Lupi molecular viewer.

functionalGroups.title: Organic Functional Groups Study Viewer - Lupi
functionalGroups.description: Study college organic chemistry functional groups with real molecule examples, recognition cues, mechanism prompts, and printable 3D viewer sheets.
functionalGroups.imageAlt: Aspirin rendered in Lupi as an organic chemistry functional-group study example.

functionalGroupExamples.title: Functional Group Examples in 3D - Lupi
functionalGroupExamples.description: Explore organic chemistry functional group examples in a 3D molecule viewer with aspirin, carbonyls, phenols, nitriles, esters, and printable study prompts.
functionalGroupExamples.imageAlt: Aspirin rendered in Lupi as a multi-functional organic chemistry example.

ochemViewer.title: 3D Molecule Viewer for Organic Chemistry - Lupi
ochemViewer.description: Use Lupi as a 3D molecule viewer for organic chemistry study with functional group cues, mechanism prompts, real coordinates, and printable viewer sheets.
ochemViewer.imageAlt: Alanine dipeptide rendered in Lupi as a 3D organic chemistry study example.

omol25.title: OMol25 Geometry Browser - Lupi
omol25.description: Search and inspect OMol25 molecules in Lupi using real DFT geometry, source-aware labels, and method-derived functional-group screens.
omol25.imageAlt: A crystalline structure rendered in Lupi for materials and molecule dataset exploration.

@graph.name: OMol25 Geometry Browser
@graph.description: A Lupi route explaining how OMol25 geometry records are searched, inspected, and labeled without pretending source bonds exist.

@graph.name: OMol25 neutral-validation geometry browser in Lupi
@graph.description: A searchable Lupi index over OMol25 neutral-validation structures with real DFT coordinates served as XYZ geometry files and method-derived functional-group screens.

omol25Geometry.title: OMol25 Molecule Geometry Dataset Viewer - Lupi
omol25Geometry.description: Open OMol25 molecule geometry as real XYZ structures in Lupi while keeping coordinates, method-derived screens, and source topology claims separate.
omol25Geometry.imageAlt: A molecular cluster rendered in Lupi for geometry-first dataset inspection.
